action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ failed with cuDNN error (non-contiguous input) in iteration 5. Analysis: Relying on pretrained model is risky; we have a working ConvTasNet baseline (PESQ 2.365, val 2.75). Training longer with augmentation and better schedule should improve. Decision: Overwrite train.py with data augmentation (random gain, Gaussian noise), ReduceLROnPlateau, gradient clipping, early stopping, and resume from best checkpoint. Update predict.py to load our ConvTasNet. Train 15 epochs (~1.5 h) and submit eval to measure progress.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 15 --resume checkpoints/best.pt --log_dir logs --checkpoint_dir checkpoints && echo 'done'
